title: clematis villosa var. stipulata
intro: Clematis villosa var. stipulata is a type of flowering vine that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family, also known as the buttercup family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to treat fever and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Clematis villosa var. stipulata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and bronchitis.
